name: Face Privacy
description: Detect and obscure faces (blur, pixelate, or black bar).

name: Remove BG
description: AI-powered background removal.

name: Remove BG (High Quality)
description: High-quality background removal using InSPyReNet (SwinB). Requires a one-time ~200 MB model download (see #mdl).

name: Silhouette
description: Black out subjects while keeping background.

name: Smart Redact
description: Detect and blur licence plates, text, or faces using OCR. Use Extract mode to store OCR text without modifying the image.

name: OCR Tag Extractor
description: Extract tags from stored OCR text (dates, prices, proper nouns). Requires Smart Redact (Extract mode) to have run first.

name: Analyse People
description: Detect and classify people using body pose landmarks and face detection. Stores results to asset metadata without modifying the image. Exposes {{sidecar.faceCount}}, {{sidecar.personCount}}, {{sidecar.poseLabel}}, {{sidecar.peopleLabel}}.

name: Glowing Eyes
description: Detect faces and replace irises with supernatural glowing eyes. Uses FaceLandmarker iris landmarks (468/473) for pixel-accurate iris centre and radius.

name: Clipping Mask
description: Apply a shape-based clipping mask.

name: Export File
description: Save a snapshot of the current canvas as an image file.

name: Save State
description: Store the current canvas pixel state for later use.

name: Load State
description: Restore a previously saved canvas state.

name: Create GIF
description: Collect frames and render an animated GIF at the end of the batch.

name: Create Video
description: Render images as an MP4 slideshow.

name: WebGL Video Stitcher
description: Combine processed images/videos into an advanced timeline using GPU crossfades, wipes, and cinematic motion.

name: Geotemporal Timeline
description: Assemble GPS-mapped images into a continuous scrolling video charting a geographical journey on a map canvas.

name: Inject Title Slide
description: Automatically injects a generated title slide into the aggregator stream when a structural variable (like City or Date) changes.

name: Contact Sheet
description: Combine images into a single grid sheet. Can optionally group by metadata.

name: Photo Stack Animation
description: Collect all photos and compose an animated polaroid stack — each photo appears on a desk in sequence. Outputs GIF or MP4.

name: Compose Grid
description: Assemble saved canvas states into a grid. Works within a single image — not a batch aggregator.

name: Extract Video Frame
description: Seek the input video to a position and draw that frame onto the canvas. Use resize/crop steps after to shape the frame.

name: GIF from States
description: Assemble saved canvas states into an animated GIF. Use after a series of Extract Frame → Process → Save State steps.

name: Video Wall
description: Composite multiple input videos into a single grid-layout MP4 (security camera wall style). Inputs are sorted by filename.

name: Template Render
description: Composite multiple input images into a pre-defined Perspective Template.

name: Animate Stack
description: Collect frames and animate them appearing on a desk surface one by one. Add overlay-polaroid-frame upstream to get polaroid borders.

name: Create PDF
description: Assemble all processed images into a multi-page PDF document at the end of the batch.

name: Create PowerPoint
description: Assemble all processed images into a multi-slide PowerPoint presentation at the end of the batch.

name: Composite onto Background
description: Aggregation node. Image 1 is the foreground subject — place an ai-remove-bg step before this to cut it out. Images 2+ are used as backgrounds (original, unprocessed). The cutout subject is composited onto each background scene. One output file per background.

name: Create ZIP
description: Assemble all processed images into a ZIP archive at the end of the batch.

name: Video: Convert Format
description: Re-encode a video file to a different container format and/or codec. Skips non-video files.

name: Video: Trim
description: Cut a video to a specific time range (in seconds). Skips non-video files.

params.name: end
params.label: End Time (seconds — leave blank for end of file)

name: Video: Compress
description: Reduce video file size by lowering the output bitrate. Skips non-video files.

name: Video: Change Frame Rate
description: Change the frame rate of a video. Skips non-video files.

name: Video: Strip Audio
description: Remove all audio tracks from a video file. Skips non-video files.

name: Video: Extract Audio
description: Export the audio track from a video as a standalone audio file. Skips non-video files.

name: Video: Remix Audio
description: Adjust the audio channel layout and/or sample rate of a video. Skips non-video files.

name: Video: Concatenate
description: Join all selected video files end-to-end into a single output video. Input order follows file selection order.

params.name: width
params.label: Output Width (px — leave blank to use first video\

params.name: height
params.label: Output Height (px — leave blank to use first video\

name: Strip Metadata
description: Remove EXIF/GPS metadata from output JPEG.

name: Set EXIF Info
description: Write custom EXIF fields to the output file.

name: Geocode
description: Reverse-geocode GPS coords via Nominatim. Sets {{city}}, {{country}}, {{state}}, {{county}}, {{postcode}}, {{country_code}}, {{suburb}}, {{road}} — plus a combined {{location}} string.

name: Extract Dominant Color
description: Quickly analyses the image to extract the top 3 dominant colors and maps them to semantic keywords for searching or variable injection. Sets {{dominantColors.0}} and {{dominantHex.0}}.

name: Standard Tuning
description: Adjust contrast, saturation, vibrance and invert.

name: Auto Levels
description: Normalise exposure by stretching the histogram.

name: Opacity
description: Set global transparency.

name: Color Tint
description: Overlay a hue over the image.

name: Duotone
description: Replace tones with two colours.

name: Vignette
description: Darken or soften image edges.

name: Advanced Effects
description: Blur, sharpen, noise, and pixelation.

name: Posterize
description: Quantise each colour channel to a fixed number of levels for a flat, silkscreen look.

name: Edge Detection
description: Sobel edge detection — extracts outlines as white lines on a black background.

name: Relight
description: Simulate repositionable point lights. Darken ambient light then add up to 3 independent colour lights using screen compositing.

name: Halftone
description: Overlay a halftone dot screen — dot size varies with image brightness.

name: Bloom / Glow
description: Extracts bright highlights, blurs them, and screen-blends back for a glow effect.

name: Chromatic Aberration
description: Splits R and B channels to simulate lens chromatic aberration.

name: Color Grade
description: Cinematic colour grading — lift (black point), shadow tint, and highlight tint.

name: Kuwahara (Oil Paint)
description: Kuwahara filter — non-linear edge-preserving smoothing that creates a painterly oil effect. Very intensive, optimized parameters applied.

name: Tilt-Shift
description: Miniature/tilt-shift effect — leaves a sharp horizontal band, blurs top and bottom.

name: Channel Swap
description: Reassign RGB channels. Swap R↔G to simulate Kodak Aerochrome infrared film.

name: Pixel Sort
description: Sorts pixels within horizontal strips by luminance — digital glitch aesthetic.

name: Dither
description: Palette reduction with Floyd-Steinberg dithering — retro 8-bit look.

name: Video Tuning
description: Adjust contrast, saturation, vibrance and invert — applied to every video frame.

name: Video Duotone
description: Replace tones with two colours — applied to every video frame.

name: Video Tint
description: Overlay a colour tint over every video frame.

name: Video Vignette
description: Darken the edges of every video frame for a cinematic look.

name: Video Advanced Effects
description: Apply blur, sharpen, film grain, or pixelation to every video frame.

name: Video Bloom / Glow
description: Add a cinematic glow by blooming the bright highlights of every frame.

name: Video Color Grade
description: Cinematic colour grading — lift, shadow tint, and highlight tint — on every frame.

name: Video Chromatic Aberration
description: Split R/B channels to simulate lens chromatic aberration on every frame.

name: Video Posterize
description: Quantise each colour channel to a fixed number of levels — applied to every frame.

name: Video Auto Levels
description: Normalise exposure by stretching the histogram — applied to every frame.

name: Video Channel Swap
description: Reassign RGB channels on every frame. Swap R↔G to simulate infrared film.

name: Video Halftone
description: Overlay a halftone dot screen on every frame — dot size varies with brightness.

name: Video Tilt-Shift
description: Miniature/tilt-shift effect — sharp horizontal band, blurred top and bottom.

name: Video Dither
description: Floyd-Steinberg palette dithering on every frame — retro 8-bit look.

name: Video Oil Paint (Kuwahara)
description: Kuwahara filter — painterly oil effect — applied to every frame. Intensive.

name: Video Pixel Sort
description: Sort pixels by luminance within horizontal strips — digital glitch aesthetic.

name: Video Watermark
description: Burn a watermark onto every frame of a video.

name: Video Caption / Text
description: Burn styled text onto every frame — supports {{variable}} injection.

name: Rich Text
description: Render styled text over the image. Supports {{variable}} injection.

name: Watermark
description: Repeat a text watermark diagonally across the image.

name: Ribbon/Badge
description: Add a corner ribbon or badge.

name: QR Code
description: Generate and stamp a QR code onto the image.

name: Grid Overlay
description: Draw an evenly-spaced grid of lines over the image.

name: Map View
description: Render an OpenStreetMap tile from GPS EXIF data and overlay it on the image.

name: Light Leak
description: Warm or cool light leak gradient from an edge — classic analog film effect.

name: Canvas Texture
description: Procedural woven-fiber texture overlay — adds the look of painting on canvas or linen.

name: Polaroid Frame
description: Adds a polaroid-style white border with optional handwritten caption in the bottom margin.

name: Scanlines
description: Draw horizontal scanlines at regular intervals — CRT monitor / video effect.

name: Template Frame
description: Draw a Template around the current image. The image is seamlessly warped to fit the primary slot.

name: Resize
description: Scale image to target dimensions.

name: Crop
description: Trim to specified region.

name: Smart Crop
description: Content-aware crop to a target aspect ratio.

name: Rotate/Flip
description: Rotate 90/180/270° or flip the image.

name: Round Corners
description: Round image corners or make circular.

name: Canvas Padding
description: Add coloured margins around the image.

name: Trim
description: Remove solid-colour edges.

name: Face Crop
description: Centre-crop around detected faces. Works best with portrait/close-up shots; lower confidence for group shots or full-body images.

name: Body Crop
description: Logic-based framing for full body or portraits using Pose detection.

name: Face Align
description: Normalize face position by leveling eyes and centering on nose.

name: Pixelate
description: Downsample then upsample with nearest-neighbour for a retro pixel-block effect.

name: Auto-Transcribe (Whisper)
description: Evaluates the primary audio track natively using WebAssembly & Transformers.js. Generates perfectly timed SRT captions and outputs them to a recipe variable.

name: Export Variable
description: Saves the contents of an engine variable (like autoCaptions) directly to the root output folder alongside your images/videos.
